summary: MEGA PROMPT #35: Pilot Agency Flow Validation - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed (simulation 10/10 PASS, metrics KPIs, incidents with enhanced fields, auth protection). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Dashboard shows Flow Health/Supplier Metrics/Finance Metrics sections, '10 Akis Calistir' button triggers simulation showing 10/10 PASS results table, Incidents panel displays severity/flow_stage/supplier/retry_count columns, Pilot Wizard works with 9-step indicator.

issues: Some 400 errors on resource load (likely unrelated endpoints) - does not affect pilot functionality

critical_code_review_comments: pilot_flow_validator.py: Excellent flow simulation with deterministic 100% success in simulation mode. All 9 steps properly implemented.
pilot_onboarding_router.py: Clean API design with SimulationPayload model, proper auth protection via require_roles decorator.
PilotOnboardingDashboardPage.jsx: All CTO-requested KPI sections present (Flow Health, Supplier Metrics, Finance Metrics). Good use of data-testid attributes.
IncidentsPanel: Enhanced fields (severity, flow_stage, supplier, retry_count) properly displayed in table columns.
seed_data_creation: 10 SimFlow agencies created during simulation test (SimFlow-1 through SimFlow-10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEGA PROMPT #35 Pilot Flow Validation fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/pilot/onboarding/run-simulation (10/10 PASS verified), GET /metrics (returns flow_health, supplier_metrics, finance_metrics KPIs), GET /agencies, GET /incidents (has severity, flow_stage, supplier, retry_count). Frontend routes: /app/admin/pilot-onboarding (dashboard), /app/admin/pilot-wizard (9-step wizard). Note: All flow tests use SIMULATION mode - not real supplier/accounting APIs.

mocked_apis.simulation_mode: MOCKED - All pilot flow tests (search, booking, invoice, accounting sync, reconciliation) use deterministic simulation responses. No real supplier or accounting API integration.

features_tested.run_simulation_10_flows: PASS - 10/10 flows completed successfully in simulation mode
features_tested.incidents_enhanced_fields: PASS - severity, flow_stage, supplier, retry_count columns in table
features_tested.simulation_results_table: PASS - Shows 10/10 PASS with flow details
features_tested.pilot_wizard_9_steps: PASS - Step indicator shows all 9 steps
features_tested.auth_protection: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 without auth
